internalName: Baan Kularb at Dhevatara Residence Estate
place: Bophut, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Beachfront Rose-Garden Pool Villa
note: Fully staffed · private chef · + tax & service
blurb: A romantic four-bedroom beachfront pool villa of around 1,000 m² in a managed residence estate at Bophut, pairing soft pink accents with a modern tropical design. A 12-metre blue-tiled infinity pool runs beside a lawn and a Thai-style poolside sala, the single-storey pavilions connected by stepping stones across a koi pond. Six minutes to Fisherman’s Village, three to Bophut Beach; fully staffed with a private chef.
detail:
Savour the beautiful beachfront view and the slow life of island living at this 1,000 m² pool villa, set within a managed residence estate at Bophut. A romantic four-bedroom home that combines warm rose-pink hues with a modern tropical design, this single-storey villa is just a six-minute drive to Fisherman’s Village and a three-minute walk to Bophut Beach.

Sun seekers will love the 12-metre blue-tiled infinity pool, set beside a lawn and an outdoor terrace of sun loungers and umbrellas; a poolside sala, a Thai-style gazebo, provides shade and the perfect spot for relaxation. The main pavilion holds the living and dining areas behind glass doors that fold away for indoor-outdoor living and entertaining, elegantly furnished and connected by stepping stones across a delightful koi pond to a kitchen with cooking appliances and a standalone breakfast bar.

Each bedroom has an en-suite shower room and glass sliding doors looking across the garden or pool; the largest is housed in a beachfront pavilion with a canopied four-poster bed, a spacious bathtub and glass doors leading to the pool terrace. Fully staffed with a private chef, and kayaks, yoga mats and a BBQ grill available on request. The shoreline in front of the estate is rocky; a short 200-metre stroll along the coast brings you to a swimmable stretch of beach.

features.l: Kayaks · yoga mats · BBQ on request
6 min to Fisherman’s Village · 3 min to beach
